extensionDescription.message:
Todo.txt MailExtension (v3). Not backward compatible with v2 (legacy).

No extra add-on required: this extension includes built-in access to local todo.txt and done.txt files. Install from addons.thunderbird.net, then open Todo.txt → Options and use Browse to select your todo.txt and done.txt files.

Basic use: Click the Todo.txt icon in the toolbar to open the popup; view, add, complete and edit tasks. Use Options to change file paths and preferences.

Calendar integration: The extension ships an experiment that can register a “Todo.txt” calendar, but modern Thunderbird 140 ESR builds (e.g. Linux Mint 140.7.2esr mint-001) do not expose the legacy calendar provider used by the original add-on. As a result, calendar views may not show Todo.txt items; the supported and tested interface is the popup plus file syncing. See ROADMAP.md for future plans to reintroduce calendar integration using supported MailExtension calendar APIs.

options_showFullTitle.message: Show Projects and Contexts in the title

options_calendar_unavailable.message: Calendar API is not available. You can export tasks with due dates to an ICS file and import them manually in Thunderbird.

options_calendar_sync_no_due.message: No tasks with due date in todo.txt.

options_fsa_hint.message: Use Browse to select your todo.txt and done.txt files. No extra add-on required.

error_filesNotSpecified.message: Please specify the location of the todo.txt & done.txt files in the options.

error_itemNotFound.message: Todo task cannot be found in todo.txt

error_eventEncountered.message: This calendar is used for Todo.txt and only accepts tasks, not events!
